arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers ends striker debate as Celtic boss makes Bayern Munich call, Champions League predicted XI
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers heads into the game knowing that Celti c need to win by a clear two goals after the Bhoys lost to Bayern Munich in the first leg 2-1 at Celtic Park. Adam Idah will be the man to lead Celtic’s line as Rodgers looks to win at Bayern.

arts.ttl: Rodgers wants Celtic to 'play without fear' against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers has urged his team to play without fear and have no regrets against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: German media ask Celtic title winner 'aren’t Bayern Munich already through' and his answer shuts down arrogance
arts.sum: The Hoops trail 2-1 from Glasgow ahead of a massive night at the Allianz Arena but some people already believe Bayern are through

arts.ttl: The key West Ham 'promise' issued to Daniel Cummings amid potential Celtic exit
arts.sum: The key West Ham 'promise' issued to Daniel Cummings amid potential Celtic exit.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich is still on the fence regarding a Bayern Munich extension
arts.sum: Per a report from Bild (as captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia ), Kimmich has been talking to other clubs since the start of the year. Bayern Munich has tied down Alphonso Davies, Manuel Neuer, and Jamal Musiala to new contracts that will keep them at the club for a longer period.

arts.ttl: Another key Bayern Munich player drops out of training with Harry Kane for Celtic clash
arts.sum: Kane missed training with a facial injury and you expect him to be fit for the game, as Joshua Kimmich joined him ahead of the visit of Celtic. Joshua Kimmich drops out of Bayern Munich training alongside Harry Kane ahead of Celtic clash

arts.ttl: Schmeichel opens up on failed "dream" move to Bayern
arts.sum: Celtic goalkeeper Kasper Schmeichel has confirmed that he came close to joining Bayern Munich a couple of years ago.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Celtic – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Bayern Munich welcome Celtic to the Allianz Arena in the Champions League tonight. The German giants hold a 2-1 advantage from the first leg last week and will be aiming to seal progress on home soil. Bayern boast a formidable European record in Germany this season, with a perfect record of four wins from four […] The post Bayern Munich vs Celtic – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers reacts to what he's heard about Harry Kane's injury status ahead of Bayern Munich vs Celtic
arts.sum: However, with the quality Bayern have at their disposal, it will be an uphill task but with news that Harry Kane is an injury doubt, the Celtic boss shared if his plans for tonight change if the England striker misses out. Harry Kane scored against Celtic for Bayern Munich in the last Champions League tie.

arts.ttl: Celtic XI vs Bayern Munich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Celtic travel to Bayern Munich tonight aiming to reach the Champions League’s last 16 for the first time since 2012/13. A narrow defeat on home soil leaves Celtic with hope, though the Scottish champions face a tough task against the German giants.
